entry.title: SAP SRM connection to SAP Public cloud s/4 hana system
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

I  have received a query from one of our financial backend systems which are doing migration from the current ECC system to the SAP Public Cloud-based S/4 system.

The current ECC system is connected to the SAP SRM for procurement functions via RFC 

After their migration to the public cloud, we need to assess the technical feasibility of running all current business scenarios from SAP SRM.

Are there any standard process / guidelines to connect SAP SRM to public or private cloud-based S/4 systems?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Allocation Number on Bank Statement SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I'm in the Bank Statement Management application F1564, where I ran the transaction and entered the assignment number as 0. However, when I check FB03, it saves a different assignment number. I made the correction manually.

Bank Statement

FB03

Is that number generated automatically? How can I correct it so it shows the bank statement assignment number?

SAP S/4HANA Finance

Hello @WouterLemaire ,
Thanks for your awesome blog, I have a requirement to consume an SAP BAPI from my CAP project so I tried to follow the steps you mentioned however I am facing a weird issue here:
The function radio button itself in the service center while adding a new external resource doesn't exist even I already created the RFC destination successfully and also implemented the sap cloud connector.

and here is the destination with a successful connection check.

can you please guide me if you faced a similar issue ?

entry.content:
Hi.

Will there be another session to attend. I had technical issues in joining which caused me not to join the session

entry.title: Delivery doesn't pick from Q-Stock as intended for NB2 Return Purchase Orders (S/4HANA OnPrem)
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in the following process:

We receive goods from a supplier, and the stock is initially posted to quality inspection stock (Q-stock). Since the goods are defective, we want to return them to the supplier. For this, we create an NB2 return purchase order.
In the PO item, the stock type is manually changed to stock type X. By default, it is set to “Unrestricted-Use Stock”. Oddly, this manual change is not saved immediately. Only after reopening and editing the NB2 PO again and re-selecting stock type X does the setting remain in the document.

After that, we create outbound deliveries for the NB2 PO in order to return the goods to the supplier. However, in the outbound delivery, the system looks at unrestricted-use stock (where the quantity is 0), instead of checking the Q-stock (where the quantity is 20) – even though the delivery type is actually configured to look at Q-stock by default.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue?
Is there an explanation for why the delivery is looking at unrestricted-use stock?
Is there a way to ensure the outbound delivery picks from Q-stock as expected?
The only related SAP Note I found is 3528419, but as far as I can tell, the stock type can indeed be changed in the NB2 PO.

Thanks in advance for any ideas or insights!

entry.title: Re: SAP DRC, Peppol / Error at PUSH operation HTTP respon...
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: Creating a CDS views
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a CDS view which will show by the end number of purchase order done by each year. I have developed the following codes but the result doesn't give all the years collected together.

Can someone tell me whats wrong with this code:

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPORDCBYYR'

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'Purchase Order Count By Year'

define view Z_POrdCByYr

as select from ekko

{

key substring (aedat,1,4) as PurOrdrYear,

count (distinct ebeln) as OrderCount

}

group by

aedat

Margit

  • Segment E1KNVKM for Master customer master contact person (KNVK)

entry.title: SAP NOTES Not Cleared in SPAU

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Timetracking integration with SAP S/4H...
entry.content: Please provide step by steo guide for integration and billingnin s4 hana

entry.title: Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, and SAP generative AI Hub
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP AI Core and SAP generative AI Hub. It is beneficial if you have knowledge about JavaScript as we're using the SAP Cloud SDK for AI with the JavaScript variant. You should also have good knowledge about the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model.

This CodeJam introduces attendees to aspects of exposing generative artificial intelligence (genAI) capabilities to execute tasks using a given business context.

During this event, you'll become acquainted with the theory behind genAI, SAP AI Core, SAP AI Launchpad, and learn how to use the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model to expose AI capabilities through your own OData service.

While working through the exercises, you'll become comfortable creating CDS-based service definitions and integrating them into the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and SAP AI Core Foundation Models.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Friday April 25th, 2025 at the SAP offices in Newtown Square, USA from 09:30 am - 3:30 pm. The workshop will be hosted by SAP America Inc. The event will be held in english.

The instructor will be @johna69 and Nana Korsah.

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome.

Please note that seating is limited - we can accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Revenue Accounting and Reporting - Event based fulfillment
entry.content:
Hello there,

I'm having trouble gaining details on functionality related to Revenue Accounting and Reporting, specifically the mechanism that triggers revenue recognition. I have a requirement that cannot look to percentage of revenue/cost incurred to drive revenue recognition, rather the progress of a WBS element/milestone being confirmed at complete. By virtue of this, I've ruled out EBRR as each method seemed to rely on the percentage of either cost/revenue.

I've then started to research RAR and the "event-based fulfillment" of performance obligations. (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/f63dd39a28bb4b90adbf9e608aff58ea/c5ce0b1d7ca34fabb4b...)

In referencing the help document, I've found the information to be vague and not detailed enough to understand if any event-based fulfillment methods will look to WBS elements as a source of information to calculate revenue recognition. 

I have two questions, is there someone in our community that has extensive knowledge to RAR, and its methods of calculating revenue in a project based process order. Does SAP have any documents that provide more detail on how these methods work and the accounting entries they drive?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Integration scenarios with SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management
entry.content:
Hello Michael
i wonder if you are aware of this integration that is on the roadmap of S/4HANA 2021:
"Ability to integrate SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for transportation management with MRP live".

This is the only place i have found something about this integration, but this feature is not really documented (at least i can not find under these topic names)
https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=089E017A62AB1EDAA6CCB767DDDCC0E5&q=MRP&range=FIRST-LAST#;INNO=000D3AAC9DD21EECA2E40687A81AE1F4
I was looking for  inbound load optimization features with TM (optimizing the PR Quantities ) according to load and inventory range.
Best regards 
Philipp

Thank you in advance. 

Best Regards,

Eunhwa Park

entry.content:
We have a CodeJam scheduled with SAP America Inc. in Newtown Square USA on April, the 25th 2025.

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/build-ai-services-using-the-sap-cloud-application-programmi...

Sign-up today to reserve a seat for this amazing CodeJam opportunity in the US headquarters of SAP.

entry.title: Re: A Multivariate Time Series Modeling and Forecasting Guide with Python Machine Learning Client fo
entry.content:
Hi, 
 I am trying to rebuild peices of your blog model to one program.
and am quite irritated since the sequence of test is not possible.
Granger demads stationary data.
Therefore Adfuller and differenciation has to take place befor that with the result that the Granger has complety different results.

Has there been any changes in the meantime?
Also the code snipets do not really seem to be connected.
Adfuller want no date but float, suddenly pandas and numpy are used .

Do I get something wrong?

Thanks for response.
Dirk

entry.title: Re: EWM opportunistic cross docking and POSC
entry.content:
Hi @MarekKaminski ,

I guess its because of quality steps , not sure, Please check below link and let us know if any questions.

"

Note

  • For the cross-docking, EWM only considers inbound delivery items for which goods receipt has been confirmed.

    EWM does not consider inbound delivery items that are relevant for the quality inspection."

  • Source Documentation : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/92d39a281861405696552d7b5340f81a.html

For your case, cross-dock should be trigger before putaway once QC... steps are completed, right ?

Prime facie you need enhancement/ BADI. Obsevation-Cross dock should trigger once quality clearWE-ZONE-IC instead of WE-ZONE before putaway, however Cross docking system triggered at WE-ZONE in standard.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Release Highlights of S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition for Public Sector (US), 2302
entry.content:
Hi Jaap, Recordsmanagement was a "cross" basis functionality and not restricted to PS customers.

Public Edition follows  the ECM strategy for now and the same goes for Public Sector customers..
With Enterprise Contract Management, you can integrate an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system with other contract assembly products (for example, SAP Enterprise Contract Assembly), to enable users to create and manage legal content that is generated out of various business scenarios in a company, such as procurement processes, sales, policies or intercompany agreements.
You can also manage contexts. See FSD  chapter 4.3.2 https://help.sap.com/doc/7c9e0bbbd1664c2581b2038a1c7ae4b3/2502.500/en-US/FSD_CE2502.pdf

or application docu: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/ff01156df84f470cb46483b8a0ba0b79/c85c7b4e7b3849b9b58ac8282de8cef4.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: How to call Function Import of external OData for fet...
entry.content:
Instead of passing parameter as object

    const result = await BDService.send("GetPDF",parameters,headers);

pass as string literal

 

  let result = await BDService.send('GET', `/GetPDF?BillingDocument='${docNo}'`);

entry.title: ETL Objects in SAP Datasphere and Dataflows Example
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

Welcome back to my other serios of blog post on an exciting feature available in SAP Datasphere, i.e., the data flows in SAP Datasphere. In this blog post, we will understand this concept with an example. 

First, let us understand the different ETL objects available in SAP Datasphere, and in this blog, we will

mainly discuss dataflows using Python scripts.

Datasphere ETL Objects:

Data Flows 

Data flow is a key component of SAP Datasphere as it allows users to perform complex data transformations, enrich data, and structure it for reporting and analytics.

In this blog, we will explore the basic features and steps to create a data flow in SAP Datasphere.

A Data Flow is a graphical ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) tool that allows users to:

✔ Extract data from various sources (SAP and non-SAP).
✔ Apply transformations such as filtering, aggregations, joins, and calculated columns.
✔ Load transformed data into target tables for reporting and analytics.

 

Remote Tables:

Replication flows:

Transformation flows:

Task chains:

Let us discuss an example about dataflows using a Python script operator. Rest operator examples are written by others in their blog posts.

Now get set and go.

Please understand the different operators provided in SAP Datasphere. Currently, SAP Datasphere does not have a full-fledged ETL capacity, just like SAP BODS does. But in future releases, SAP data intelligence will be added as a feature that can be used in E2E ETL scenarios.

Python Script 

Supported Python Libraries as of now in SAP Datasphere:

Nympy and Panda. 

https://pandas.pydata.org/docs/user_guide/index.html#user-guide

https://numpy.org/learn/  

The Python script operator area is not as mature as the Jupyter notebook and is not so user-friendly. If you face any syntax error, it is a little tricky to find out the error unless and until we execute the dataflow to see the exact error in the data integration monitor. Hope SAP can integrate the Jupiter notebook IDE with SAP DataSphere with many more libraries to support so that the data science and AI capabilities can be further explored.

I will cover the error handling part and the running/scheduling of dataflow in a separate topic under data integration monitor topic.

Target table and options.

Now, deploy and run the dataflow. This is how we create a dataflow in SAP Datasphere. Also, we can schedule the dataflow, or we can integrate with a task chain and schedule the task chain as well with other flows.

Points to be noted and limitations with dataflows are :

When we create a new remote table, it is created virtually using the data federation mechanism. Original data stays in the remote source system, and SAP Datasphere just points to that table.

We cannot use the remote table directly inside a dataflow. We need to create a view on top of that remote table and then consume the view inside a dataflow.

Kindly test this scenario from your side as well. Thank you for reading this blog post, and I hope you liked the content.

watch out for next set of topics in coming days

Thanks,

Narasingha

entry.title: When will prices for SQL Anywhere on the SAP Online Store be fixed?
entry.content:
The price for all SQL Anywhere license options on the SAP Online store seems fixed at $495 USD.  For example, that is the price for "SAP SQL Anywhere, advanced edition (core)" and "SAP SQL Anywhere, remote database client". 

I discussed this with a SAP representative in the Store Chat.  The representative said she would notify the appropriate people and keep me up to date via email.  I have heard nothing.  

This problem seems new after migrating the E-Commerce provider to CleverBridge.  

I may very well need to send a customer to the SAP Online store.  Right now I can't!

entry.title: Year end revenue adjustment automatically in Public cloud
entry.content: We want to check with if the year-end deferrals/accrual adjustments in the preceding year can be configured to be automatically reversed the following year? For example, the deferrals/accruals generated in the system in December 2024 can be automatically reverse in January 2025. If cannot be automatically reverse, how can we reverse the YE deferral/accrual in P/L that is currently lying in the balance sheet account. please help.

entry.title: Re: Returns process for advanced intercompany sales (5D2)
entry.content:
Hi, we've set up 2F4 in combination with 5D2, like suggested.

Unfortunately, some documents are missing and this process is unsuitable for this.

We're now trying to implement returns as suggested (BKP) here using points 1-3, but I get a message immediately upon creating the customer returns that the supplier, so the business partner representing the plant, is not suitable for customer returns. What is SAP's approach to resolving this? I just read on SAP Help, that it is not allowed using internal business partners for that scenario. Maybe I have to activate any further Scope item?

entry.title: Re: Country dimension for Expense Reporting not working for Subledger and Concur
entry.content:
Hi Virendra,

Financial Accounting operates multi-dimensional on GAAP whereas the legal entity Company explicitly belongs to one country. We do not understand why the accounting documents should carry a country ISO code. Especially for the depreciation posting run we do not see any need to fill redundant information. 

In any way, you should request new functionality via a CIP request und specify the business/legal need.

Best, 
 Mick

i found the FM get_home _address Which is calling the home address and its correctly updating the same for employee bp but unable to find any fm/class/method to see where the employment address is coming from and its updating the employee bp address to employment BP ADDRESS can you please guide

entry.title: Completely deleting a material
entry.content: Hello, is there a way to completely delete a material so that i can re create it with the same number

entry.title: What You Need to Know About the SAP Tax Jurisdiction Upload Template (US) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public E
entry.content:
Working with tax jurisdictions in SAP can be confusing, especially when first encountering them. This blog post simplifies the process of understanding and using the SAP tax jurisdiction upload template for US implementations based on Release 2502—Scenario executed in the configuration environment CBC for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

We'll cover the characteristics per tax jurisdiction level and tax code.

This blog is here to guide you through filling in the template and steer clear of common mistakes!

 

What are Tax Jurisdiction Levels?

In the US, tax jurisdictions are broken down into four levels:

  • Level 1 - State: Consider state taxes, like the ones that fund schools and roads.
  • Level 2 - County: County taxes often pay, for example, local police and hospitals.
  • Level 3 - City: City taxes help pay for, for example, garbage collection and parks.
  • Level 4 - Authority: These special districts might collect taxes for specific projects.

Where Do I Get Tax Jurisdiction Information?

The company's accountants can provide the necessary tax jurisdiction information based on where the suppliers are located. There isn't one specific website with all the details because each state and even particular areas within a state can have different taxes and rates.

* Be sure to read any disclaimers about the template before you start on the document attached in this blog S4H_384 Setup of Internal Tax Jurisdictions.pdf - Page 4 - 1.2 Disclaimer.*

How to Download the Tax Jurisdiction File:

  • In your SAP configuration environment (like CBC), open the configuration activity "Upload Tax Rates"  ID  100426.

  • Download the template:

  • Open the template on your computer using Notepad.
  • Turn on the Status Bar in Notepad (View -> Status Bar). In the lower left-hand corner of the text viewer, you see an indicator of line and column. The column indicator helps to validate the number of characters per line (which must be 122 per line) and the space following the cursor. Flush left, for example, is column 1:

Key Points to Keep in Mind:

  • One Line per Tax Jurisdiction: The file includes one line for each tax jurisdiction and its corresponding tax code.

  • Not All Levels Required: You don't need to include every single level for every state.

  • Tax Categories: Each tax jurisdiction can have up to 5 tax categories:

     Purchase operations:

  1. I0 – A/P Sales Tax, exempt.
  2. I1 - A/P Sales Tax, taxable, distributed to line items
  3. U1 – A/P Use tax, taxable, self-assessed.

     Sales operations:

  1. O0 – A/R Sales tax, exempt.
  2. O1 – A/R
  • Use Spaces, Not Tabs: Use spaces to fill in the correct number of characters for each field.  Don't use the tab key.

  • Exact Lengths: Each field must have the exact number of 122 characters specified.

  • Discount base amount is the net value (DiN)'. Could be 'X' or ' '. “X” is only valid for Level 1.

  • Base amount for tax is net of discount (TxN)'. Could be 'X' or ' '. “X” is only valid for Level 1.

  • Zero Percent Tax: Use tax code 'O0' for sales and 'I0' for purchases if the tax rate is 0%.

  • Blank or Incomplete Lines:**  SAP will ignore blank or incomplete lines.

  • Lines Starting with '#':**  SAP will ignore any lines that begin with a '#'.

  • Recommended Practice: Use the state's two-letter code for the Level 1 state value (e.g., CA for California). This approach will help final users easily identify and maintain the tax codes.

Filling in the template:

The examples provided are fictional and illustrate how tax jurisdictions and codes should be structured.

I will provide an example of the tax jurisdiction structure in Colorado, using tax code I1 and detailing the four different levels.

  • Tax Jurisdiction Level 1- State – tax code I1:

Position

Value

Description

Notes

1-6

“000001”

Record number

6 digits for identifying lines in the file.

7-14

“      CO”

State

8 characters. Use space for the first 6 characters and the last 2 for the State code. Can be numbers or letters. For example, '01' or ‘AL’

15-22

“      00”

County

8 characters. Use space for the first 6 characters and Level 1; the value is always 00.

23-30

“   00000”

City

8 characters. Use space for the first 3x` characters and Level 1 value is always 00000.

31-38

“       0”

Authority Level

8 characters. Use space for the first 7 characters, and for Level 1, the value is always 0.

39

“1”

Jurisdiction Code Level Indicator

For Level 1, the value must be 1.

40-41

“i1”

Tax Code

Possible values:
I1, I0, U1, O1 or O0

42

“2”

Tax Code Type

Possible values:
1 - Tax code O1
2 – Tax code I1
3 – Tax code U1
4 – Tax code I0
5 – Tax code O0

43-50

“20250101”

Date Changed

Format YYYYMMDD

51-100

“CO                                               “

Description

Alphanumeric value

101

“ “

Space, Reserved

It must be a blank space

102-112

“       2900”

Tax Rate

The value must be provided without the decimal point. Value equals the tax rate percentage * 100,000. For example, here is 2.9%. One calculates 0.029* 100,000 = 2900

113

“X”

DiN - Discount based amount is the net value

For level 1, this value can be X or a blank space. Depends on the business requirement.

114

“X”

TxN – Based amount for tax is net of discount

For level 1, this value can be X or a blank space. Depends on the business requirement.

115-122

20250101

Valid From Date

Format YYYYMMDD

  • Tax Jurisdiction Level 2- County – tax code I1:

The values listed below differ from those in the Tax Jurisdiction Level 1 example – Tax code I1:

Position

Value

Description

Notes

1-6

“000002”

Record number

6 digits for identifying lines in the file.

15-22

“      01”

County

8 characters. Use space for the first 6 characters, and for levels different to 1, the value is always other than 00.

39

“2”

Jurisdiction Code Level Indicator

For Level 2, the value must be 2.

40-41

“i1”

Tax Code

Possible values:
I1, I0, U1, O1 or O0

42

“2”

Tax Code Type

Possible values based on the tax code (40-41):
1 - Tax code O1
2 – Tax code I1
3 – Tax code U1
4 – Tax code I0
5 – Tax code O0

113

“ ”

DiN - Discount based amount is the net value

For level 2, this value must be a blank space.

114

“ ”

TxN – Based amount for tax is net of discount

For level 2, this value must be a blank space.

  • Tax Jurisdiction Level 3- City – tax code I1

The values listed below differ from those in the Tax Jurisdiction Level 1 example – Tax code I1:

Position

Value

Description

Notes

1-6

“000003”

Record number

6 digits for identifying lines in the file.

15-22

“      01”

County

8 characters. Use space for the first 6 characters, and levels are different to 1; the value is always other to 00.

23-30

“   80001”

City

8 characters. Use space for the first 3 characters, and levels are different to 1; the value is always other to 00000.

39

“3”

Jurisdiction Code Level Indicator

For Level 3, the value must be 3.

40-41

“i1”

Tax Code

Possible values:
I1, I0, U1, O1 or O0

42

“2”

Tax Code Type

Possible values based on the tax code (40-41):
1 - Tax code O1
2 – Tax code I1
3 – Tax code U1
4 – Tax code I0
5 – Tax code O0

113

“ ”

DiN - Discount based amount is the net value

For level 2, this value must be a blank space.

114

“ ”

TxN – Based amount for tax is net of discount

For level 2, this value must be a blank space.

  • Tax Jurisdiction Level 4- Authority – tax code I1:

The values listed below differ from those in the Tax Jurisdiction Level 1 example – Tax code I1:

Position

Value

Description

Notes

1-6

“000004”

Record number

6 digits for identifying lines in the file.

15-22

“      01”

County

8 characters. Use space for the first 6 characters, and levels are different to 1; the value is always other to 00.

23-30

“   80001”

City

8 characters. Use space for the first 3 characters, and levels are different to 1; the value is always other to 00000.

31-38

“       1”

Authority Level

8 characters. Use space for the first 7 characters, and levels are different to 1; the value is always other to 0.

39

“4”

Jurisdiction Code Level Indicator

For Level 4, the value must be 4.

40-41

“i1”

Tax Code

Possible values:
I1, I0, U1, O1 or O0

42

“2”

Tax Code Type

Possible values based on the tax code (40-41):
1 - Tax code O1
2 – Tax code I1
3 – Tax code U1
4 – Tax code I0
5 – Tax code O0

113

“ ”

DiN - Discount based amount is the net value

For level 2, this value must be a blank space.

114

“ ”

TxN – Based amount for tax is net of discount

For level 2, this value must be a blank space.

Once the file is complete, upload it in the configuration activity "Upload Tax Rates" ID 100426.

The system will display a pop-up message to add a Transport Request.

In the CBC system, you may have multiple transports open and available. In this case, the system prompts you to choose which transport you want to use for your changes.

In the next screen, you will get the log:

You must transport the project from Q to P System.

Import Tax Codes after Transport

After the project is imported into the P-System, the Tax rates must be activated in Pricing. The app ‘Import Tax Codes after Transport’ needs to be executed for this step.

  • Enter ‚US‘ in the country field and press F4.
  • Select the Task SMBUSE/0TXUSX and confirm.

  • Execute once the fields Transport Number is filled with /SMBUSE/0TXUSX and Country is filled with US.

The results are available in the configuration activity, Define Tax Codes for Sales and Purchases, ID 101016

Helpful SAP Resources:

  • SAP Roadmap Viewer > SAP Activate for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (3SL)  > Explore > Fit-to-Standard Analysis > Finance Conduct - Workshop > Accelerators > Setup of Internal Tax Jurisdictions for USA.pdf (SAP Customer).pdf
  • The Setup of Internal Tax Jurisdictions for USA.pdf (SAP Customer) .pdf file > Page 26 provides an example with all the different tax codes.
  • SAP Help Portal > Upload Tax Rates (United States)
  • SAP Help Portal > How to Fill Out the Upload Template for Upload Tax Rates

 

If you find this information helpful, please remember to give a kudo.

Stay tuned for more tips and insights!

entry.title: Create Technical users in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
How to create Technical User in SAP Public Cloud Applications for running batch jobs.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Create Technical users in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
You can follow below steps to create Technical / Communication User:

  • Go to Maintain Communication User app 
  • Select New 
  • Create a new Technical User as per your requirement 
    • Add User ID
    • Add Description 
    • Add User Password
    • Add certificates if any
  • Select Create 

 

Refer below Help Centre documents :

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/53e36b5493804bcdb3f6f14de8b487dd/7fb79d7a811146679646ebfb5844b858.html

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/0377adea0401467f939827242c1f4014.html

entry.title: Re: Deploy SAP Fiori App on S/4 HANA Public Cloud with SA...
entry.content:
Hi

As per Create a Destination to Connect to SAP Business Application Studio | SAP Help Portal:

Authentication has to be SAMLAssertion and WebIDEUsage=odata_abap,dev_abap.

For more information about Business Application Studio and UI development in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, please refer to

  • 3297481 - SAP Business Application Studio Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me
  • 3445942 - UI Development in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Frequently Asked Questions - SAP for Me

Thank you and Best Regards,

Pooja

entry.title: Re: Migration of Location and Logistics Area using Migration Template
entry.content:
Hi.
I´m trying to create new areas ID in current site. is it possible? using the template i added information on  "LOA - General" and "LOA description" only but when i try to import they show that there are nothing to import because there´s nothing in "Location" tab.

entry.title: Re: Change Story filter programmatically
entry.content:
Hi @RoccoCaliandro,

yes that´s quite easily possible. If you just click on the three dots in the top right of your listbox, you´ll get the option "Edit Scripts", which will open the code editor for an "onSelect()" function.

Please enter the following coding:

Application.getFileDataSource("xxx").setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy("yyy", Alias.FlatHierarchy, ["zzz"]);

xxx is the ID of your DataSource. DataSource refers to the data model you´re using. Please notice, that you need the ID, not the technical name or description. The easiest way to get the id is just pressing CTRL+Space after entering: "Application.getFileDataSource(". This will open a popup, where you can select of all data models that are currently part of your story.

The same goes for the yyy, your dimension (in your case something like "HistoryType"). Just press CTRL+Space here again.

Last but not least the same CTRL-Space action for the zzz, the values you want to filter "History Type" to.

Best regards,
Denis

PS: If this solution helped you, please mark it as "accepted solution", thanks.

entry.title: Re: connect to SAP ai launchpad error ui5 version
entry.content:
With a Chrome extension such as ‘ModHeader - Modify HTTP headers’, you can temporarily correct the problem by replacing

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.10/resources/sap-ui-core.js

by  https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.23/resources/sap-ui-core.js

entry.title: Re: CR reports cannot connect to SQL Server database
entry.content: There is no version of CR for VS shipped with VS 2022, you need to download it from here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html . Only way to get support is to purchase CR Server, there are no single case support any more. GO here https://www.sap.com/canada/products/technology-platform/crystal-server.html

entry.title: in our client developed a custom field in acdoca table

entry.title: Re: Looking for advanced training material and/or classes

Hello there,

You can find the below course for the Studio:
https://learning.sap.com/courses/sap-cloud-applications-studio-for-sap-business-bydesign

You can also find the below community blog post which can be applied for both SAP Sales / Service Cloud and SAP Business ByDesign products:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/getting-started-with-the-cloud-application-studio-new-video-series/ba-p/13426964

This is the official Studio documentation:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_APPLICATIONS_STUDIO/cbcebe3cfb1647a8b0322c18dbb0b481/751bc8d273e21014bfa4f7ac03265b0e.html?locale=en-US&version=CLOUD

I hope this helps.

BR,
Thiago

entry.title: Re: Query to show "Production Order" and related "Issue f...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Try to search the OILM table. Something like this:

SELECT *

FROM OWOR

INNER JOIN OILM ON OILM."TransType" = OWOR."ObjType" AND OILM."DocEntry" = OWOR."DocEntry"

From there, you can access the OBTL table.

Reference: https://biuan.com/OILM

Best regards

entry.title: How to transport request between tenants in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi SAP guys, 

 

I am studying how to transports request between the tenants of the new sap s/4 hana public cloud. 

 

I learn how to create new requests and release with the app Export Customizing transports, but in the app for import/transport the request I am getting a message that my tenant cannot able to import/transport the request. Can you explain to me how to transports requests between diffrent tenants there, I have the 100 and the 080(developer tenant). 

Best regards, Marcelo Oliveira.

entry.title: ITsMobile - ALV not resizing after S4 migration
entry.content:
Hi guys,

After migrating our system to S4, the ALV containers on our ITSMobile screens stopped automatically resizing the column widths.
I've tried several approaches—using set_optimize, fixing columns outputlengh, enabling the resize option on the container—but none had any effect. I'm out of ideas at this point. Could you help me?

I'm using cl_salv_table and cl_gui_custom_container.

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: Can somene help me how to deactivate SAP GTS to the P...
entry.content: Thank you very much Fabian ,It worked

entry.title: Re: In S4HC, report showing Sales Order Line Items
entry.content: Thank you very much, Dequan. SAP management, if you're reading, it's surprising that such a basic sales report doesn't exist. This should not require a custom report. Please considering adding it. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: unable to drill down in a Crystal report chart
entry.content:
Hi Keith, no idea then, it seems odd that it works in 2016 and not 2020 from the same browser...

Because of that one would surmise it's not the browser but both me and R&D don't have the issue your customer has, so if we can't duplicate it we can't fix it....

My thinking is it has to do with the same issue of paging in a WEB app, if PostBack and sessions are not used then you don't get page 2.

In their case the pop-up doesn't show because AV or Firewall is blocking it, something like cross site scripting possibly, for the new CRS site...

Curious are they using a dual monitors? Could be the popup is redirecting onto the second screen.

See if this helps?

https://answers.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/forum/all/pop-upsub-window-of-main-window-of-program-off/224264b7-d55a-42a5-8b54-f170dc6525d7

Even if they don't have a second monitor for some reason popups have been redirected to one.

What is their screen resolution?

entry.title: Re: SAP Advantage ODBC drivers
entry.content: I will message you privately with my contact details

entry.title: Re: How to create RKF (Restricted key Figure) In SAC Add-...
entry.content: You can use LOOKUP or RESTRICT to create RESTRICTED KF

entry.title: Re: Explore SAP BTP DMS Rest APIs

For creating Document  how did you create media file into binary.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP BTP Job scheduling service SAAS dependency
entry.content:
This tutorial (link) goes into great detail about how to integrate the job scheduling service into the app and enable multitenancy. However, it seems a bit outdated, as SAP has released a newer version of the sidecar project that allows users to directly add SaaS dependencies without needing to implement the "/-/cds/saas-provisioning/dependencies" callback. (saas dependencies).

Has anyone recently tried adding the job scheduling service as a SaaS dependency?

Note: I am working with a trial account.
Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Migrating to Crystal 64-bit questions
entry.content: Hi Anders, oh, but you said "We also hope that 64 bits will help with the memory issues we have been having with Crystal". My Main test app is only 50Mb, after I load and view a report, it likely goes higher if I export... Thanks again... Don

after making below selections:

Could you please advise?

 

Thanks

J

entry.title: In the mobile app I can't see a selection of multiple attachments in the offer
entry.content: In the mobile application I can"t see a multiattachmentselection document that created the custom field, but it has mobile permissions but can"t see it. Why does this happen that I can"t see the field?

entry.title: Re: "Missing connection of material in plant to the mater...
entry.content:
Hello again dear user,

And thank you for getting back to me.

The Material Ledger activation checkbox is greyed out because it's controlled centrally.

Make sure ML is active for your plant and the material is properly extended.

If you’re in S/4HANA Cloud and the config looks correct, but the issue persists, consider raising an SAP incident.

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: SAP Build Process - return to top?
entry.content:
I have a request (api trigger) that starts a workflow (process) with 2 approvals.

1) Request triggers workflow

2) 1st approver adds information - approves

3) 2nd approver rejects workflow 

Ideally, I would like to send the workflow task BACK to #2

Is that possible?

James

entry.title: Internal external candidate
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a problem. I am trying to generate a rule with internal and external candidates differentiation.

Is there a way how I can differentiate between internal and external candidates via rule.

I know there is a standard field on CPT - externalCandidate , however this is a system field and I am unable to view/fetch it in business rules but it is visible in  OData dictionary.

Please advise.

Thanks

Nimesha

entry.title: SAP ALM Deep dive workshop - Houston, TX
entry.content:
Event Highlights:

  • Explore the importance of a robust ALM strategy for driving business growth and agility.
  • Gain in-depth knowledge about SAP Cloud ALM and its pivotal role in managing intelligent cloud and hybrid business landscapes.
  • Participate in hands-on sessions for implementation and operations
  • Engage in interactive sessions with SAP ALM experts and network with peers.
  • Discover how to seamlessly transition to SAP Cloud ALM, the go-to platform for all your Application Lifecycle Management needs as an SAP customer.
  • Enhance your expertise by taking the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge test, which will demonstrate your ability to effectively manage the design to deploy phase of business transformations using an integrated approach with an end-to-end tool chain.

Register Now for full-day event which is designed to offer your customers valuable insights and hands-on experience with SAP Cloud ALM Implementation and Operations capabilities, empowering them to drive business transformation and enhance efficiency.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit integration suite with internal Serve...
entry.content: I am facing the same issue. Maybe the problem is on SAP side?

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP With Prostgres Serice in BTP
entry.content:
Hi @satya-dev  thanks for the guide, is there a way to consume the postgresql database directly from the CAP app in BAS? I have my ssh tunneling setup but when i run cds deploy i get a connection time out.

I did add the credentials as follows:

        "credentials": {
          "host": "127.0.0.1",
          "port": 5432,
          "database": "gkrMCwWYPAtk",
          "user": "010a4a601cc0",
          "password": "....."
        }
 
And the tunnel:
cf ssh -L localhost:5432:postgres-f4b40fb8-3467-4f37-9a73-91b5bd8399ec.ce4jcviyvogb.eu-central-1.rds.amazonaws.com:7934 bscscrumcalm-srv -N
 
I know the tunnel works because I can use the postgresql database via client (DBeaver).
 
Thx

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library Unavailable due to O...
entry.content: It has been fixed by SAP with updating the sap-ui-core.

entry.title: Re: Applying User Defaults in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Jocelyn,

We are currently using SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition and I tried to assign user default values in Manage Purchase Orders app but it is not possible at transaction level. 

But the classic apps such as the Create Purchase Order -Advanced app can be used to personalize the default values, and use templates for more efficiency. 

My question is , is there any timeline as to the deprecation of this classic app? or how long can we use this app? 

 

Thank you and best regards,

April

#ManagePurchaseOrder #CreatePurchaseOrder-Advanced

entry.title: SAP ALM Deep dive workshop - Chicago, IL
entry.content:
An in-person SAP Cloud ALM Deep Dive Workshop will be held at the SAP office in Chicago, IL. This full-day workshop is designed for SAP customers and partners interested in strengthening their knowledge and capabilities in SAP Cloud ALM for both implementation and operations.

The agenda includes expert-led sessions, hands-on exercises, and peer networking opportunities—all focused on helping attendees maximize the value of SAP Cloud ALM in their business transformation journey.

Why Attend?

  • Explore the latest features and innovations in SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Participate in hands-on sessions for both implementation and operations scenarios.
  • Gain practical insights into managing cloud and hybrid landscapes using SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Learn how to align your ALM strategy with business goals to support agility and growth.
  • Interact with SAP ALM experts and connect with peers across industries.
  • Complete the onsite assessment to earn the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge, validating your expertise in end-to-end lifecycle management.

    Additional Information

    Attendees are encouraged to bring their own laptops for hands-on exercises and for taking the badge assessment. A dedicated network will be available for use during the sessions.

    Registration : https://go4.events.sap.com/sap-alm-events-na/en_us/home.html

    Participation is free, but subject to approval due to limited seating.

entry.title: Re: How to create KPI in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2?
entry.content:
Hi,

At the moment, KPI's are not yet developed in V2 version. You can post your requirement/vote for the requirement, under the following links (SAP Sales Cloud Version2: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3766; Service Cloud Version 2 and Enterprise Service Management: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3765)

Thanks,

Trivedhi

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit integration suite with internal Serve...

entry.title: Re: LMS:How to configure Learning History connector to ca...
entry.content: The learning history connector much like the Learning History Data Import tool is not designed to include tasks; however you can submit this as an enhancement in the Customer Influence page similarly like https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/42114

entry.title: Re: Could Race Conditions Occur in This SAP CAP Scenario?
entry.content:
@Willem_Pardaens 

Hello,

we replaced cds.connect.to with cds.services, and the race condition behavior stopped.

entry.title: Re: SDMI CL_SDM_BUT0BK_V2
entry.content:
Hi,

did you resolve this issue ?
I even stuck in two different upgrades (each upgrade to 2023) in the si-check. I also get the error for the class CL_SDM_BUT0BK_V2.
In the "sdm_mon" i can´t see this class. So i am even not able to restart the sdm.

In my opinion this error appears since the new version 113 of si-check note 2502552. In my sandbox system with version 111 this error didn´t appear in the si-check phase.

I already checked possible notes in the sap help portal without any correct solution to proceed in the upgrade.

So if you have any solution for this issue in your opened case, it would be nice if you can share it with the community

 

Thanks and best regards

 

Michael

entry.title: Re: Assignment profile LMS - prevent a training already l...
entry.content: You may see it multiple times via the admin view of the user's assigned items, but generally the user will only see one item if assigned through multiple methods and completion will account for all (except through certain settings/conditions like curricula specifics).  Learning plan audit report will help determine the AP or origin and time of assignment if needed to differentiate.

entry.title: NACE output determination issue for settlement documents
entry.content:
Hi, I'm facing an issue in NACE output determination issue for settlement documents. The Custom partner fuction is not appearing into Nace Output management for settlement.

Kindly help.

entry.title: AATP Product Allocation table in Fiscal Period instead of Calendar Month
entry.content:
Hi Gurus 

I hope you can help me with an answer or point me to a source where I might find it ...

When it comes to time dimension, all our Supply Planning (including Demand Planning) is done in Fiscal Periods which don't match the calendar month.

Currently the set up of the Product Allocation table uses calendar month. It would be more convenient to use Fiscal month. That would match the data in IBP (we use SAP IBP for Demand Planning and Supply Planning), easier for the demand planner and easier for the integration IBP (via CI-DS) to S4. Is that possible, to use a different time unit? Does it has to be necessarily calendar month?

Thanks in advance

Best regards

Roberto

entry.title: Re: New Pipeline Concept features: integrated runtimes and supporting landscape stages
entry.content:
We activated the integrated messaging runtime and use it for a high load use case (>100.000 proxy messages per day).

We have used this scenario with PIP configuration already before without integrated runtime and everything went smooth. With the usage of the integrated runtime we receive for 1 out of 10.000 messages an error in the PIP07 step (scenario specific outbound).

The error says something about an invalid xpath expression, but that's not the important thing.
The problem is, that there is absolutely no payload attached to this message (and therefore the xpath validation fails). When I go in retry mode from PIP04_DLQ to PIP04 and activated the trace for the corresponding PIP07 iFlow, there is no payload attached.
The source message is an SAP backend proxy message and I can verify that the proxy message was sent with a valid payload and it was not empty.

We haven't seen this behaviour in the weeks before without the usage of integrated runtime, just now after activating it. But I can't make sense of it at the moment.
Is it related to the new integrated runtime step or to the current XI sender adapter version or other platform updates...

entry.title: Re: Configuration: SAP Business Network SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authenticati
entry.content: However with the approach recommended by @Milen33 wouldn't you have to setup the saml app in IAS a little different than what @ondrej_pandoscak is recommending? I'm thinking in that case you'd have to set the name of the app to the actual remoteLogin URL and maintain only one (the relaySAML) url in the ACS section - with index 0. Not sure about it, but just trying to clarify.

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 Release on-demand recordings ?
entry.content: Thanks, but this is just for one of 14 sessions. The issue is that each event should have a recording.

entry.title: Can this Q&A session for learning be held after the updates are available in preview environment?
entry.content: The 1H 2025 updates are will be available in our preview environment (T1) on April 14. It would have been convenient to have this Q&A  session after April 14 so we could see the updates and ask more relevant questions.

entry.title: A Condition in BW Query (BW/4HANA)
entry.content:
A Condition placed in BW Query (BW/4HANA) works fine in Tcode-RSRT(ABAP_BICS) option, but doesn't work well in Tcode-RSRT(Aanlysis for office) option or while running the query directly in AFO.

Any reason for this ambiguous behavior?

Helpful suggestions will be appreciated.

Thank You.

entry.title: Re: Create BP in role TM0001 (Driver) via Migration Cockpit?
entry.content: DID YOU FIND A SOLUTION?

entry.title: What's New in Business Network for Supply Chain - 2025 Q1 Release
entry.content:
SAP Business Network for Supply Chain

Discover the Latest in SAP Business Network for Supply Chain: 2025 Q1 Update. Dive into our newest blog post, "What’s New in SAP Business Network for Supply Chain" for 2025. This article focuses on the exciting features introduced in the 2025 Q1 Release. It's tailored for those looking for an in-depth look at the improvements launched in early 2025 for SAP Business Network for Supply Chain. Below, you'll find a summary of the updates expected to enhance our customers' experience. 

1. Streamlining Compliance with Quality Inspection Certificates in ASN Uploads 

In today’s supply chain landscape, ensuring product quality and compliance is more critical than ever — especially as companies work to meet sustainability goals, regulatory standards, and industry-specific requirements. For suppliers managing quality-controlled materials and buyers ordering such materials, we’ve introduced two new features that simplify the process of handling quality certificates: 

  • Mass Upload for Quality Documents: In addition to adding quality certificates during ASN creation, suppliers can now upload quality certificates during the ASN mass upload at the line-item level. This functionality reduces manual effort, improves data accuracy, and allows for faster processing by enabling bulk certificate uploads. 
  • Buyer Control to Mandate Required Documents: On the buyer side, organizations can specify exactly which quality certifications are needed for each purchase order. This empowers buyers to ensure that only the required certificates are mandatory, helping to streamline the procurement process and enforce compliance standards. 

By simplifying these two processes, businesses can more effectively track critical certifications, such as: 

  • Sustainability credentials and carbon footprint documentation 
  • Compliance with environmental or safety regulations 
  • Industry-specific certifications ensuring product integrity and regulatory adherence.  

Key Benefits: 

  • Improved Compliance: Reduces the risk of missing important certificates, supporting regulatory, sustainability, and industry-specific requirements. 
  • Enhanced Process Adoption: Encourages smoother adoption of internal processes for ship notices and quality certificates across the supply chain. 
  • Improved Traceability: Ensures certificates are only mandatory if specified in the PO, improving traceability and reducing the need for updates before goods receipt generation. 

This feature not only simplifies supplier collaboration but also empowers organizations to maintain stronger oversight and meet their broader environmental, compliance, and quality assurance goals with greater confidence.  

 

 

2. Batch-managed Material Validation in ASN Creation  

Ensuring the accuracy of batch information is crucial for compliance and traceability, especially for certain industries with batch-managed products. To support this, we’ve introduced two key enhancements that improve data integrity for batch-managed materials. 

  • Mandatory Supplier Batch ID: The Supplier Batch ID field can now be marked as mandatory based on a flag in the purchase order item. 
  • Improved Validation for Production and Expiry Dates: Enhanced validation checks for production and expiry dates ensure accuracy when handling batch-managed materials. 

Historically, while SAP Business Network supported batch information in various transactions, there was no mechanism in place to ensure mandatory batch entry during ASN creation. This update addresses that gap, making batch information mandatory where required, ensuring better traceability and reducing the need for updates before goods receipt generation. 

These enhancements offer greater control over batch-managed materials, ensuring that suppliers provide the required information and buyers can maintain full traceability and data integrity across their supply chain. 

3. Qualtrics Survey: Enhancing Feedback Collection for Continuous Improvement  

To better understand user needs and improve our platform, we've expanded on a previous feature to make providing feedback easier and more accessible. Supplier users can now share their thoughts during the Purchase Order, Order Confirmation, and Ship Notice creation processes through a Qualtrics survey. 

The feedback process is streamlined in two ways: 

  • A side tab allows users to voluntarily click and provide input. Once clicked, a pop-up prompts users to share their thoughts. 
  • We’ve introduced a push survey mechanism, which randomly prompts users to provide feedback at time-spaced intervals, without requiring them to click on the feedback tab. This makes it easier to offer input without disrupting the user's workflow. 

This feedback is optional, and users also have the option to sign up for additional research sessions to provide more detailed input to our UX and Product Management teams. 

4. Ensuring Accurate Serial Number Validation in Component Consumption  

To improve material traceability and reduce errors in subcontracting processes, we’ve introduced a feature that allows buyers to require contract manufacturers to select serial numbers directly from their component inventory during component consumption. This ensures that contract manufacturers can only select serial numbers that are available, ensuring only valid components are used. This is particularly critical in certain industries like life sciences, where precise traceability is essential to prevent costly product recalls. 

The feature is composed of two parts: 

  • New Transaction Rule for Serial Number Validation: Buyers can enable a transaction rule that ensures contract manufacturers select only serial numbers from available inventory. 
  • Enhanced UI for Serial Number Selection: In the UI, suppliers can select serial numbers from the Consumed Component Serial Number pop-up, with an “Autofill Serial Number” feature to speed up the process.  

The validation is also supported in B2B and Excel upload scenarios. 

Key Benefits:  

  • Improved Traceability: Ensures only valid serial numbers are used, preventing mistakes and enhancing traceability and compliance and ensuring accurate inventory tracking. 
  • Enhanced Control for Buyers: Buyers can enforce serial number validation to maintain control over material consumption and ensure compliance. 
  • Improved Parent-Child Material Traceability: The system’s handling of the parent-child relationship ensures proper linking of serial numbers, ensuring accurate tracking for related components. 

5. Efficient Management of ASN and Handling Unit (Packaging Materials) Number Ranges  

Managing ASN and Handling Unit Number ranges can be cumbersome, especially when dealing with a large supplier base. For customers who need to create number ranges for individual suppliers, this can result in a long list of entries that are difficult to navigate — particularly when a customer has hundreds or thousands of suppliers. Additionally, pagination can make it harder to find specific entries, requiring users to click through multiple pages. 

To address this, we’ve introduced a feature that enhances the management of number ranges by enabling faster searches based on two new parameters: Supplier Name and Network ID. This streamlines the process for businesses that need to manage many number range configurations. 

Key Benefits: 

  • Faster Search and Enhanced Navigation: Enables faster access to specific number range configurations and reduces the need to click through multiple pages. 
  • Improved Management of Supplier Relationships: Ideal for businesses that require unique number ranges for each supplier, making it easier to manage and maintain complex setups. 

This new feature makes managing ASN and Handling Unit Number ranges more efficient, saving time and improving usability for customers handling large numbers of supplier configurations. 

6. Expanded Custom Attributes for Enhanced Planning Collaboration  

Every industry has unique and specific planning criteria, and to support this, we’ve increased the number of customer-defined attributes for planning records to 60 for both buyers and suppliers. This enhancement offers greater flexibility to capture the data that matters most to your business, enabling more tailored and detailed planning collaboration. 

The Excel upload/download feature also supports up to 30 additional columns for custom attributes, requiring the latest versions of Excel for compatibility. 

Key Benefits: 

  • More Flexibility: Capture up to 60 custom attributes and 30 additional Excel columns to meet industry-specific planning needs. 
  • Better Collaboration: Share and manage more relevant, detailed data between buyers and suppliers. 

7. Improved Planning and Order Tracking with New Key Figures and Flexibility for Supplier Part ID

To help buyers and suppliers stay on top of their order quantities, we’ve introduced two new key figures: Open Order and Open Replenishment Order. These key figures show the net quantity of orders that have yet to be received within a specific time period. This is calculated by subtracting the total quantity of goods receipts from the total quantity of orders with a requested delivery date. 

The new key figures allow buyers and suppliers to easily see what is still pending, improving visibility and planning. 

Key Benefits: 

  • Quick Overview: Gives a clear view of remaining orders that still need to be received based on the original order quantity and what has already been delivered. 
  • Better Planning: These key figures can be used in other calculations, like Projected Stock, to improve decision-making for both buyers and suppliers. 

Additionally, we’ve introduced a new setting that enables purchase orders to be matched using only Buyer Part IDs and Plant IDs, ignoring Supplier Part IDs. This is useful for organizations where Supplier Part IDs frequently change or are not immediately available, ensuring more flexible and reliable transaction matching and ultimately a smoother planning process.  

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Please visit https://www.sap.com/businessnetwork to learn more about SAP Business Network.

To explore SAP Business Network for Supply Chain, visit SAP Business Network Supply Chain Collaboration

For updates on our community and activities, please visit the: SAP Business Network Community

SAP Business Network for Procurement and SAP Business Network for Supply Chain

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process - return to top?
entry.content:
as per usual... after I posted the question, the answer became apparent...

There is an event called 'go to step', which is available ONLY if there is more than one path.

Sometimes, the simple answers elude me...

entry.title: Re: SAP statistical components
entry.content: Thanks a lot Vaibhav, I will study the content in the links.

entry.title: Re: How to Call RESTful APIs from SAP ABAP: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
Hi @TT5 ,

I believe below is what you are looking for? 

lv_string = xco_cp_json=>data->from_abap( itab )->to_string( ).

regards

Mark

entry.title: Re: How to transport request between tenants in SAP S/4HA...
entry.content:
Hi,

All information about moving transport is described in help in this link https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3482742

Best regards, Łukasz

entry.title: Re: Recreate or Copy Screens using XML SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Are you referring to the show XML component button inside UI Designer?
That is located at the UI Designer toolbar.

BR,
Thiago
